creator: p9711422@mmu.edu.my
text:
* upgrade freetype2 to version 2.0.5

Fix: [root@nuzrin /usr/ports/print]# diff -ruN freetype2 freetype2-new
PORTNAME=      freetype2
-PORTVERSION=   2.0.4
+PORTVERSION=   2.0.5
 CATEGORIES=    print
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE:S,%SUBDIR%,freetype,} \
                http://sunsite.cnlab-switch.ch/ftp/mirror/freetype/%SUBDIR%/ \
unix-def.mk: $(TOP)/builds/unix/unix-def.in
How-To-Repeat: None
